title: Tool-call instrumentation wrapper
userStory: As an operator, I want all tool registrations wrapped so that observability coverage is complete with one-line changes.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/lib/server/tools/instrument.ts exports instrument<I, O>(tool) that records start time, status, latency, and inserts a row into brain.tool_calls in finally
On error, status='error' captured, error rethrown
Wrapper plumbs model + input/output tokens + cost from outer chat context when available
Every tool registration wrapped with instrument(...)
Verify: a chat turn that calls 3 tools writes 3 rows to brain.tool_calls with non-null latency_ms
